creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
gabor       2006-12-10 21:18:11 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-p2p/verlihub     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    net-p2p/verlihub/files pkg-message.in

  Log:
  - Add rc(8) script
  - Fix plugin support
  - Fix dependencies
  - Modify doc-set
  - Add database support for non-English hubs
  - Installation fixes
  - portlint(1)
  
  PR:             ports/102406
  Submitted by:   Pankov Pavel <pankov_p@mail.ru>
  Approved by:    erwin (mentor), maintainer timeout
